properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes I fall To my knees and pray, Come, Jesus, come, Let today be the day, Sometimes I feel Like I'm gonna break, But I'm holding on To a hope that won't fade.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come, Jesus, come, We've been waiting so long, For the day You return To heal every hurt, And right every wrong, We need You right now, Come and turn this around, Deep down I know, This world isn't home, Come, Jesus, come.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There'll be no war, And there'll be no chains, When Jesus comes, Let today be the day, He'll come for the weak, And the strong just the same, And all will believe, In the power of His name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come, Jesus, come, We've been waiting so long, For the day You return, To heal every hurt, And right every wrong, We need You right now, Come and turn this around (turn this around), Deep down I know, This world isn't home, Come, Jesus, come, Come, Jesus, come.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: One day He'll come, And we'll stand face to face, Come and lay it all down, 'Cause it might be today, The time is right now, There's no need to wait, Your past will be washed, By rivers of grace.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Come, Jesus, come, We've been waiting so long, For the day You return, To heal every hurt, And right every wrong, We need You right now, Come and turn this around (turn this around) Deep down I know, This world isn't home, Come, Jesus, come, Come, Jesus, come, Come, Jesus, come.
